author: dcicc4
text: Schema registry compresses FLOAT default value of 0.0 to 0 and then reader fails to read it as valid

author: dcicc4
text:
As part of saving data to our schema registry it compacts the default value of '0.0' to '0' this creates an issue when trying to read the schema as 0 is not considered a valid float

Suggested fix: If the scheam\_type is FLOAT/DOUBLE and the default isinstanceof Int, caste it to FLOAT instead of rejecting it as invalid.

[fastavro/fastavro/\_schema.pyx](https://github.com/fastavro/fastavro/blob/022dbbef27cf5fc349f0d8925bd56e71a3c8317e/fastavro/_schema.pyx#L349)

Line 349
in
[022dbbe](/fastavro/fastavro/commit/022dbbef27cf5fc349f0d8925bd56e71a3c8317e)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | or (schema\_type == "float" and not isinstance(default, float)) |

  

[fastavro/fastavro/\_schema.pyx](https://github.com/fastavro/fastavro/blob/022dbbef27cf5fc349f0d8925bd56e71a3c8317e/fastavro/_schema.pyx#L180)

Line 180
in
[022dbbe](/fastavro/fastavro/commit/022dbbef27cf5fc349f0d8925bd56e71a3c8317e)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | or (schema == "float" and not isinstance(default, float)) |

author: scottbelden
text: I think this makes sense and should be pretty easy to fix. If you'd like to submit a PR please feel free otherwise I will try to get to it when I have a moment.

author: scottbelden
text: allow ints as default values for floats
